title: Senior Software Engineer - Curefit - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Curefit - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Curefit invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Software Engineer at our Howrah location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Curefit:
Curefit is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Curefit!
